title: Evangelion Cover Feature in Aera Magazine 8 24
display_title: Evangelion Cover Feature in Aera Magazine 8 24
wikitext:
[]: Evangelion Cover/Feature in Aera Magazine 8/24             Quote Post by BlueBasilisk » Thu Aug 13, 2015 8:29 am http://neweva.blog103.fc2.com/blog-entry-3971.html According to this, an upcoming issue of Aera magazine is going to feature a Rei cover and some kind of feature on Evangelion, probably related to the series's 20th anniversary!

[]:             Quote Post by AR-99 » Sun Aug 16, 2015 8:15 pm And Smart magazine has something coming up too on August 24.

[]:             Quote Post by BlueBasilisk » Mon Aug 17, 2015 9:38 am http://neweva.blog103.fc2.com/blog-entry-3971.html It looks like Smart is getting an Asuka & Rei illustration by Honda! Edit: http://neweva.blog103.fc2.com/blog-entry-3998.html And there's the Rei cover sketch for Aera. Pretty darn cute.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Fri Aug 21, 2015 8:03 pm Bumping for those who missed it, since edits don't bump threads: tweet-body — twitter-user (@username) date document.querySelectorAll('blockquote.twitter-tweet > a').forEach((t) => t.href = t.href.replace('x.com', 'twitter.com'))

[]:             Quote Post by AR-99 » Sat Aug 22, 2015 2:41 pm Time to see if my local Kinokuniya stocks Aera. Also need to get the September issue of Young Ace since that has an Eva cover too (I only get it at those times). Too bad Smart doesn't have an Eva cover this time, that won't get picked up.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Mon Aug 24, 2015 7:10 pm tweet-body — twitter-user (@username) date document.querySelectorAll('blockquote.twitter-tweet > a').forEach((t) => t.href = t.href.replace('x.com', 'twitter.com')) They're not kidding about calling those past Asuka illustrations "gravure pages"!
